methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 24 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Skyeton operates in the Defense & Security sector at the Growth stage. The valuation universe comprises 10 known comparable companies: 2 public entities (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private firms including Anduril Industries, Saronic, Flock Safety, Shield AI, and Chaos Industries.

Peer-median valuation methodology is not applicable here. Despite 24 same-sector Defense & Security comparables existing in the market, the filtered peer set yielded insufficient data: 0 companies at identical stage, 1 at adjacent stage, and 0 at similar valuation tier. The minimum threshold for statistical reliability is 3 datapoints; applying an all-sector median would introduce unacceptable distortion given the heterogeneity of Defense & Security subsectors and business models.

Without triangulation support from multiples analysis, this valuation exercise cannot produce a quantified range. A credible assessment would require either: expansion of the private comp dataset with disclosed transaction multiples from the named peer set, or alternative methodologies (DCF with disclosed or reasonably modeled financials, recent third-party fundraising rounds). The lack of disclosed total capital raised and current valuation further constrains bottom-up analysis. Future valuation work should prioritize obtaining same-stage private comparable data or commissioning a primary market check with institutional investors active in this subsector.
